description: These tribal look sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the heavy beading, making it perfect for everyday stylish wear. Team these with dresses, and jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather thong straps on the forefootBeaded strips criss-crossing over the front of the ankle for added styleHeel cup with zippered opening on the back for easy insertion and removal of the feetLeather covered footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
